title: Traditional Algerian Bitter Dumplings
description: A unique, gluten-free dessert featuring bitter dumplings in a sweet gooey sauce, topped with a creamy milk glaze.
instructions: Prepare gooey sauce by melting 2 tbsp of sugar, 1/4 cup of milk, and 2 tbsp of Algerian bitter in a saucepan over low heat.
Dip each dumpling into the gooey sauce, coating evenly.
Place coated dumplings on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15 minutes or until dumplings are lightly toasted.
While the dumplings bake, prepare the milk glaze by whisking together 1 cup of milk and 2 tbsp of sugar in a small bowl.
Remove dumplings from the oven and brush with milk glaze.
